zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Longland於大約1323年出生在英國時，他的父親Hugh de Longland38歲，母親Margaret de Furneaux23歲。他與Isabel Beaupré結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1380年6月19日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特達爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Longland于大约1323年出生在英国时，他的父亲Hugh de Longland38岁，母亲Margaret de Furneaux23岁。他与Isabel Beaupré结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1380年6月19日在英国英格兰薩默塞特達爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any of the many minor places in England called Longland(s) or Langland(s). There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname   Langlands  .

variants.name: Langland
meanings: English: topographic name from Old English lang, long ‘long’ + land ‘land’, ‘territory’.
Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Langlands
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Longlands
meanings: English, Scottish: variant of Longland with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname Langlands .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Longland was born about 1323, in England, his father, Hugh de Longland, was 38 and his mother, Margaret de Furneaux, was 23. He married Isabel Beaupré. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died about 19 June 1380, in Cheddar, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Longland est né environ 1323, à Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Longland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Furneaux, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Beaupré. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 19 juin 1380, à Cheddar, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Longland um 1323 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Longland 38 und seine Mutter Margaret de Furneaux 23. Er hat Isabel Beaupré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb um 19. Juni 1380 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Cheddar, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Longland è nato il circa 1323 nel England, il suo padre, Hugh de Longland, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Furneaux, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Beaupré. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì circa 19 giugno 1380, nel Cheddar, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Longland(이)가 대략 1323년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Longland(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Furneaux(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isabel Beaupré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1380년 6월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 체더르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Longland nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Longland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Furneaux, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Beaupré. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 19 de junho de 1380, em Cheddar, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Longland родился около 1323 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Longland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Furneaux, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Beaupré. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер около 19 июня 1380 г. в местности чеддар, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
